g.title: SixFourNetworks
g.text: SixFour neural networks and how they relate (master 623392b). Blue = LIVE I-JEPA core; coral/dashed = LookNet (V2-deferred); green = on-device self-reinforcement; gray = frozen, zero-param.

g.title: cluster_frozen
g.text: FROZEN SUBSTRATE (zero params — the I-JEPA tokenizer; bit-exact Zig floor)

g.title: cluster_ijepa
g.text: I-JEPA HEAD (LIVE learned core — the current direction)

g.title: cluster_looknet
g.text: LOOKNET FAMILY (V2-deferred sigma-pair genome MoR transformer)

g.title: cluster_atlas
g.text: ATLAS — on-device SELF-REINFORCEMENT (MPSGraph, proven on iPhone 17 Pro)

g.text: Bradley-Terry from user A/B picks -> PersonalGenome
